google-alphabet.summary: CADE preliminary measure (2024) requiring Google to allow third-party app stores on Android in Brazil; investigation ongoing.

apple.summary: CADE preliminary measure (Nov 2024) ordering Apple to allow sideloading and third-party app stores on iOS in Brazil within 20 days.

jbs-n-v.summary: Brazil Lista Suja: JBS historically appeared on the Ministry of Labor forced-labor registry (cattle suppliers); $2B+ in US-related ESG penalties at parent group.
